commonChangelog.description: Title for tooltip for button that redirects user to the Chrome extension's version history and changelog.

commonSupportDevelopment.description: Title for tooltip for button that redirects user to the Chrome extension's donation page.

commonHelpAndFeedback.description: Title for tooltip for button that redirects user to the Chrome extension's support hub.

commonFloatingMode.description: Title for tooltip for button that opens the Chrome extension in a separate window.

commonStorageUsage.description: Title for tooltip and heading for the view that shows how much storage the clipboard history is using.

commonSettings.description: Title for tooltip for button that opens the Chrome extension's settings.

commonProfile.description: Title for tooltip for button that opens a menu with various actions relating to the user's profile.

commonManageSubscription.description: Label for the menu item that opens the page where the user manages their paid subscription.

commonSignOut.description: Label for the menu item that signs the user out of their account.

commonOpenWebApp.description: Label for the menu item that opens the web version of the application in a new browser tab.

commonAll.description: Label for the tab that lists every clipboard history item.

commonFavorites.description: Label for the tab that lists clipboard history items the user has marked as favorite.

commonCloud.description: Label for the tab that lists clipboard history items synced to the cloud.
